choices.name: No_I_want_to_update_the_existing_contact_details
choices.choiceText: No - I want to update the existing contact details

value.stringValue: No - I want to update the existing contact details

choices.name: Yes_I_want_to_set_up_different_contacts
choices.choiceText: Yes - I want to set up different contacts

value.stringValue: Yes - I want to set up different contacts

decisions.name: Is_Sold_to_bill_to_the_same
decisions.label: Is Sold to/bill to the same

formulas.name: Change_Log_Bill_To
formulas.expression:
"The changes in the bill to contact are as follows:" & BR() &
IF({!Bill_to_First_name} <> {!Bill_To_First_old}, " First Name changed to: " & {!Bill_to_First_name} & " from: " & {!Bill_To_First_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Bill_to_Last_Name} <> {!Bill_last_old}, " Last Name changed to: " & {!Bill_to_Last_Name} & " from: " & {!Bill_last_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Bill_City_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToCity__c}, " City changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToCity__c} & " from: " & {!Bill_City_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!bill_Address_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToAddress1__c}, " Address changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToAddress1__c} & " from: " & {!bill_Address_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Bill_Email} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToWorkEmail__c}, " Email changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToWorkEmail__c} & " from: " & {!Bill_Email} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Bill_Phone_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToWorkPhone__c}, " Phone changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToWorkPhone__c} & " from: " & {!Bill_Phone_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Bill_State_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToState__c}, " State changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToState__c} & " from: " & {!Bill_State_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Bill_Zip_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToPostalCode__c}, " Zip Code changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToPostalCode__c} & " from: " & {!Bill_Zip_old} & ".", "")

formulas.name: Change_log_Sold_to
formulas.expression:
"The changes in the bill to contact are as follows:" &
IF({!First_Name}<> {!Sold_first_old}, " First Name changed to: " & {!First_Name} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_TO_FirstName} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Sold_To_Last_Name_text} <> {!Sold_Last_old}, " Last Name changed to: " & {!Sold_To_Last_Name_text} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_Last_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Sold_City_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToCity__c}, " City changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToCity__c} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_City_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Sold_Address_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToAddress1__c}, " Adress line changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToAddress1__c} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_Address_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Sold_Email} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToWorkEmail__c}, " Email changed To: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToWorkEmail__c} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_Email} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Sold_Phone_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToWorkPhone__c}, "Phone changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToWorkPhone__c} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_Phone_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Sold_State_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToState__c}, " State changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToState__c} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_State_old} & ".", "") & BR() &
IF({!Sold_Zip_old} <> {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToPostalCode__c}, "Zip Code changed to: " & {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToPostalCode__c} & " changed from: " & {!Sold_Zip_old} & ".", "")

formulas.name: New_Sold_to
formulas.expression: "New Sold To created:" & BR() & "First Name:"& {!First_Name1} & BR()& "Last Name: "& {!Last_Name1} & BR()& "Email: "& {!Email.value} & BR()& "Adress Line: "& {!Address_Line_1} & BR()& "Zip Code: "& {!Zip_Code} & BR()& "Sold To Country: "& {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToCountry__c} & BR()& "City: "& {!City}& BR()& "Phone: "& {!Phone.value}

formulas.name: NewBillTo
formulas.expression: "New Bill To created:" & BR() & "First Name:"& {!First_Name1} & BR()& "Last Name: "& {!Last_Name1} & BR()& "Email: "& {!Email.value} & BR()& "Adress Line: "& {!Address_Line_1} & BR()& "Zip Code: "& {!Zip_Code} & BR()& "Bill To Country: "& {!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToCountry__c} & BR()& "City: "& {!City}& BR()& "Phone: "& {!Phone.value}

fields.name: Select_which_contact_you_want_to_create
fields.fieldText: Select which contact you want to create

fields.name: Bill_to_Country_show
fields.fieldText:
Bill To Country

{!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__BillToCountry__c}

fields.name: Sold_to_country_show
fields.fieldText:
Sold To Country

{!Get_Billing_Account.Zuora__SoldToCountry__c}

fields.name: Error_message
fields.fieldText: Please click "Previous" and select at least one Billing contact to update

fields.name: Message
fields.fieldText: The Billing Account Update has been submitted, the change will be reflected in Salesforce in a few seconds. For any issues - reach out to salesops@similarweb.com

fields.name: create_or_update
fields.fieldText: The current contact is set up as both the Bill to and Sold to. Would you like to set up a different contact for either the Bill to or Sold to?

textTemplates.name: Bill_to_chatter
textTemplates.text: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} has updated the Bill to contact

textTemplates.name: Chatter_Post_sold
textTemplates.text: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} has updated the Sold to contact

textTemplates.name: Create_Bill_To_chatter
textTemplates.text: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} has created a new Bill to contact

textTemplates.name: Create_Sold_to_chatter
textTemplates.text: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} has created a new Sold to contact
